frame_analyses.description: The needle is being prepared on the needle driver.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper alignment of needle is necessary for efficient placement.

frame_analyses.description: Suture is being placed through the first mark on the Penrose drain.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Alignment is good with slight deviation from the target mark.

frame_analyses.description: Suture continues to second mark placement.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: First mark penetration accomplished; transitioning to second.
First throw is a double throw using the right hand.

frame_analyses.description: Second throw in progress, hand switch observed.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Hand switching has been executed correctly for the second throw.
Completion of third throw with proper hand switch.

frame_analyses.description: Cutting one end of the suture.
Completion phase with both suture ends cut.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completed successfully without visible gaps in the slit.

knot_assessments.notes: Executed correctly with good tensile strength.
Second throw is tight and secure.
Completes the knot securing process effectively.

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Suture placement successful and slit closed without gaps.

technique_summary: The task was completed successfully with proper hand switching and secure knot tying. Slight suture deviation observed.
improvement_suggestions: Improve precision in suture placement to reduce deviation.
Ensure faster execution of suture cutting phase.
